_meta.description: Email campaign templates for Karnot CRM. Edit this file to add/update templates without changing code.
_meta.howToAdd: Copy an existing template block, give it a unique key, fill in the fields. Icon must be one of: Zap, FileText, ArrowRight, Target, Mail, Send, Users, Calendar, Play
_meta.howToEdit: Change subject, html, label, desc, tags — then refresh the Email Marketing page.
_meta.variables: Use {{ contact.FIRSTNAME }}, {{ contact.LASTNAME }}, {{ contact.COMPANY }}, {{ unsubscribe }} in HTML

investment_teaser.label: Investment Teaser
investment_teaser.desc: Full branded Karnot template with real metrics from financials. Best for first contact with investors.
investment_teaser.subject: Opportunity: Clean Energy Investment in the Philippines
investment_teaser.html:
KARNOT ENERGY SOLUTIONS

Clean Energy Investment Opportunity

Dear {{ contact.FIRSTNAME }},

I'm reaching out because we have an exciting clean energy investment opportunity in the Philippines that aligns with impact-focused portfolios.

The Philippines Opportunity: Electricity costs at ₱14/kWh — among the highest in Asia — create massive demand for energy-efficient solutions. Karnot's CO2 and R290 heat pump technology delivers 75%+ energy savings under our Energy-as-a-Service model.

Our EaaS Model: Customers pay zero upfront. We install our iHeat systems and share the energy savings 50/50 — generating $1,100/month per site in recurring revenue for Karnot.

$33K
Monthly / 30 Sites
13mo
Capital Payback
7.7×
5-Year Return

Investment: We're raising a $430K seed round — $250K via convertible note (10% p.a., 20% Series A discount, $3M cap) and $180K in strategic equity at $1.2M pre-money. Minimum entry is $5,000.

By 2030, we project $14.8M revenue at 37% net margin, with 77% revenue CAGR. Our 30-unit pilot fleet also avoids 1,890 tonnes CO₂ annually.

Request Data Room Access →

I'd welcome the opportunity to share our investor deck and discuss how this fits your portfolio.

Best regards,
Stuart Cox
CEO, Karnot Energy Solutions
stuart.cox@karnot.com

Karnot Energy Solutions · Philippines · iheat.ph

You're receiving this because you expressed interest in clean energy investments.

plain_professional.label: Plain Professional
plain_professional.desc: Clean, text-focused email that looks personal. Best for bypassing spam filters. Uses real financial metrics.
plain_professional.subject: Clean Energy Investment — Philippines Market
plain_professional.html:
Dear {{ contact.FIRSTNAME }},

I'm Stuart Cox, CEO of Karnot Energy Solutions. I'm reaching out about a clean energy investment opportunity in the Philippine market.

The Philippines has some of the highest electricity costs in Asia at ₱14/kWh, creating significant demand for energy-efficient solutions. Our CO2 and R290 heat pump systems deliver 75%+ energy savings to commercial and industrial clients under an Energy-as-a-Service (EaaS) model.

How EaaS works: customers pay zero upfront — we install and maintain the system, then share the energy savings 50/50. This generates $1,100/month per site in recurring revenue, with a 30-site fleet producing $396,000/year.

Key highlights:

• 50/50 savings split — $1,100/month recurring per site
• 13-month capital payback on fleet deployment
• 7.7× return over 5 years on a $250K fleet investment
• $430K seed round: convertible note ($3M cap, 20% discount) + strategic equity ($1.2M pre-money)
• 2030 projections: $14.8M revenue, 37% net margin
• BOI-registered enterprise (Board of Investments, Philippines)
• 1,890 tonnes CO₂ avoided annually per 30-unit fleet

Minimum investment is $5,000. If this aligns with your interests, I'd welcome the opportunity to share our data room and investor deck.

You can learn more at iheat.ph

Stuart Cox
CEO, Karnot Energy Solutions
stuart.cox@karnot.com
Unsubscribe from future emails

follow_up.label: Follow-Up
follow_up.desc: Short follow-up for contacts who didn't respond to the first teaser. Friendly, low-pressure.
follow_up.subject: Following up: Karnot Energy Solutions Investment
follow_up.html:
KARNOT ENERGY SOLUTIONS

Hi {{ contact.FIRSTNAME }},

I wanted to follow up on my earlier email about our clean energy investment opportunity in the Philippines.

Since then, we've seen strong momentum — our EaaS model is generating $1,100/month per site with a 50/50 savings split, and our 30-unit pilot is on track for $396K annual recurring revenue.

A few quick numbers that stand out:

• 13-month payback on deployed capital
• 7.7× return over 5 years
• 23:1 LTV:CAC ratio — exceptional unit economics
• $14.8M projected revenue by 2030 at 37% net margin

Minimum entry is $5,000 via our strategic equity track ($1.2M pre-money valuation).

Would you be open to a quick 15-minute call this week? I'd love to walk you through our latest numbers.

View Our Latest Updates →

Best,
Stuart Cox
CEO, Karnot Energy Solutions

Karnot Energy Solutions · iheat.ph

energy_manager.label: Energy Manager
energy_manager.desc: For facility/energy managers at hotels, hospitals, food processors. Focuses on savings and zero upfront cost.
energy_manager.subject: Cut Your Hot Water Energy Bill by 75% — Zero Upfront Cost
energy_manager.html:
Slash Your Hot Water Energy Costs

Energy-as-a-Service by Karnot

Hi {{ contact.FIRSTNAME }},

What if you could cut your facility's hot water energy costs by 75% — with zero capital expenditure?

Karnot's iHeat CO2 heat pump systems replace conventional electric or LPG water heating with ultra-efficient heat pump technology. And with our Energy-as-a-Service model, there's nothing to buy upfront.

75%+ Savings
Average energy reduction vs electric water heaters

How it works:

1. We install and maintain the iHeat system at your facility — zero cost to you
2. Your hot water energy bill drops by 75%+
3. We share the savings 50/50 — you keep half, we keep half
4. Our iSTOR battery provides 3-4 hours of backup hot water even during outages

Ideal for: Hotels, hospitals, food processors, laundries, and any facility with high hot water demand.

We're currently deploying across Luzon and have capacity for new installations.

Get a Free Energy Assessment →

I'd welcome the chance to visit your facility and show you exactly how much you could save.

Best regards,
Stuart Cox
CEO, Karnot Energy Solutions
stuart.cox@karnot.com

Karnot Energy Solutions · Philippines · iheat.ph

esco_partner.label: ESCO Partner
esco_partner.desc: For energy service companies and channel partners. Revenue sharing and white-label opportunities.
esco_partner.subject: Partnership Opportunity: Heat Pump EaaS for Your Clients
esco_partner.html:
Partner with Karnot Energy

Add Heat Pump EaaS to Your Portfolio

Hi {{ contact.FIRSTNAME }},

I'm reaching out because I believe there's a strong partnership opportunity between {{ contact.COMPANY }} and Karnot Energy Solutions.

We manufacture CO2 and R290 heat pump systems in the Philippines and deploy them under an Energy-as-a-Service model. Our partners earn recurring revenue from every installation — no inventory risk, no upfront cost to your clients.

Partner Revenue Model:
• Each site generates $1,100/month in savings-share revenue
• Partners earn a referral share on every active installation
• 50/50 savings split means clients see immediate, measurable ROI
• Karnot handles installation, monitoring, and maintenance

Why ESCOs choose Karnot:

• Proven 75%+ energy savings vs electric/LPG heating
• Zero CAPEX for end clients — removes the biggest sales objection
• IoT-monitored with predictive maintenance
• iSTOR battery backup for 3-4 hour coast time
• Carbon credit generation (Gold Standard via Rubidex)
• BOI-registered with local manufacturing

Our unit economics are strong: 23:1 LTV:CAC ratio, 13-month capital payback, and $396K annual revenue per 30-site fleet.

We're looking for ESCO partners across the Philippines and ASEAN region.

Explore Partnership →

I'd love to set up a call to discuss how we could work together.

Best regards,
Stuart Cox
CEO, Karnot Energy Solutions
stuart.cox@karnot.com

Karnot Energy Solutions · Philippines · iheat.ph

carbon_impact.desc: For ESG/impact investors and sustainability-focused contacts. Leads with carbon avoidance data.
carbon_impact.subject: 1,890 Tonnes CO₂ Avoided — Clean Energy Impact Investment
carbon_impact.html:
Impact Meets Returns

Karnot Energy Solutions — Clean Energy Investment

Dear {{ contact.FIRSTNAME }},

What if your investment could deliver strong financial returns and measurable environmental impact?

Karnot Energy Solutions deploys CO2 heat pump technology in the Philippines under an Energy-as-a-Service model — and every installation directly reduces carbon emissions.

1,890
Tonnes CO₂ Avoided/Year
$27.6K
Annual Carbon Credits

The impact story:

• Each 30-unit fleet avoids 1,890 tonnes CO₂ annually
• Carbon credits verified via Gold Standard through Rubidex
• $27,600/year in carbon credit revenue per fleet — on top of EaaS income
• 75%+ reduction in energy consumption vs conventional electric heaters

The financial story:

• 50/50 savings split generating $1,100/month per site
• $396K annual recurring revenue per 30-site fleet
• 13-month capital payback
• 7.7× return over 5 years
• 2030 projections: $14.8M revenue, 37% net margin

We're raising $430K in seed funding. Minimum investment is $5,000 via strategic equity at $1.2M pre-money valuation.

Request Impact Report & Data Room →

I'd love to discuss how Karnot can fit into your impact portfolio.

Best regards,
Stuart Cox
CEO, Karnot Energy Solutions
